name: vscode-extension-tester-controller
description: VS Code extension that provides remote control via WebSocket for automated testing

extensionTester.controllerPort.description: Port for the controller WebSocket server

scripts.vsix: npm run clean && npm run bundle && vsce package --no-dependencies --allow-missing-repository --allow-star-activation --skip-license -o ../cli/assets/controller-extension.vsix
scripts.package: npm run clean && npm run bundle && vsce package --no-dependencies --allow-missing-repository --allow-star-activation --skip-license
